overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a lone character sitting on a rocky mountain cliff at night, overlooking a distant valley settlement. The static camera captures the atmospheric landscape as a train passes through the valley below, its lights visible in the darkness.

agents.ego_description: sitting motionless on a rocky outcrop overlooking the valley, occasionally shifting posture

notable_agents.action: sitting on the cliff edge facing the valley, wearing a hat and coat

entered.detail: large gray rock formation where the character is seated
scattered warm lights from a settlement in the valley below
dark silhouettes of trees covering the rolling hills
dark overcast sky with subtle cloud textures

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene on a rocky mountain cliff. A lone character sits on the right side overlooking a vast valley with distant settlement lights. The landscape is dark and atmospheric with forested hills visible on the left and an overcast sky above.

events.description: train with illuminated windows becomes visible moving through the distant valley from left to right
train exits the frame to the right, disappearing into the distance

agents.ego_description: continues sitting on the rock ledge, now watching the train pass through the valley

notable_agents.action: sitting on cliff edge observing the train passing below
passenger train moving through the valley with lit windows visible in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The scene continues with the character still seated on the cliff. A train with bright windows becomes visible in the distant valley, moving horizontally across the frame from left to right before disappearing, adding a dynamic element to the otherwise still nighttime landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a still, atmospheric nighttime vista on a rocky mountain cliff that is momentarily animated by the passage of a distant train. It begins with a lone character seated on the right side of the cliff, overlooking a vast, dark valley dotted with the faint lights of a distant settlement under an overcast sky. As the camera holds its position, the stillness of the forested hills and the silent landscape is interrupted by a train with bright windows appearing in the valley below. The scene then follows the train as it glides horizontally across the frame from left to right, adding a flicker of movement to the darkness before it finally disappears into the distance.
